Let us see what happened in the state of Tamilnadu. Mars came close to the earth.
Mars is bhumi karaka it can came closer to earth . I had written in my website there
will be mass death in the states of Tamilnadu , Andhra ,kerela and Karnataka.
Secondly there was mock sun . two sun was seen in the district of cuddalore and also
black halo was seen around the sun. when double sun was seen in china, Yangtze
river broke it banks.
Thirdly jayalaitha took the oath in rishbha lagna. There was exchange between the
8th and 6th lord . 8th lord is Jupiter in sixth house and 6th lord Venus in the 8th
house. There fore there will be loss of lives and property in state of Tamil nadu. It is
also the bhukthi of Venus. It is also the bhukthi of rahu which is with Saturn.
2. THE BIRD FLU. - 03/02/2006 10.07 AM
There has been real threat of bird flu, especially in the western part of the country like
Maharashtra.
